title: PF_Backlight Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub PF_Backlight (FeederNumber As Integer, State As Boolean)
parameters:
FeederNumber	Integer number representing the feeder
		 number

State	Sets On (True) / Off (False)
description: Turns the built-in backlight on or off.
notes:
When the system is controlling vision, the backlight is automatically turned on and off as needed. Use this method to control the built-in backlight on status when the system is not controlling vision.

PF_Backlightt Example

VB
